title: ClearrChatZ
description: A simple chat clearing plugin that allows admins to clear innapropriate chats
body:
# ClearrChatZ - The Ultimate Chat Management Plugin ## Introduction ClearrChatZ is a lightweight yet powerful Minecraft server plugin designed to provide server administrators and moderators with an elegant solution for managing chat clutter. With a single command, it instantly clears the chat window by filling it with blank lines, providing a fresh start for conversations while maintaining a professional server appearance. ## Key Features ### 🌟 Instant Chat Clearing ClearrChatZ provides a simple `/clearchat` or `/cc` command that instantly clears the chat window by adding configurable blank lines, making previous conversations scroll out of view. This feature is perfect for: - Starting fresh discussions - - Removing inappropriate content quickly - - Creating clean breaks between server announcements - - Resetting chat after heated discussions - - Keeping your server chat organized and professional ### 🛠️ Highly Customizable Every aspect of the plugin can be tailored to your server's needs: - Customize the plugin prefix and colors - - Adjust the number of blank lines for different chat window sizes - - Configure notification messages and sounds - - Show or hide who cleared the chat - - Choose to broadcast clear notifications or keep them private - - Set permission nodes for different staff ranks ### 💼 Staff-Friendly Features - Permission-based access control system - - Option to display which staff member performed the clearing action - - Concise command (`/cc`) for quick access during moderation - - Console support for remote moderation ### 🚀 Performance Optimized - Minimal server resource usage - - No database requirements - - Efficiently handles high-traffic servers - - No lag or performance impact ### 🔌 Easy Integration - Simple installation process - - Compatible with all major Minecraft versions (1.20 - 1.21.5) - - Works alongside other chat management plugins - - No dependencies required ## Why Choose ClearrChatZ? ### 🎯 Focused Design Unlike bloated chat management plugins, ClearrChatZ does one thing and does it exceptionally well. The focused approach ensures reliability, performance, and ease of use. ### 👥 Player Experience Players appreciate a clean, well-moderated chat environment. ClearrChatZ helps create a more enjoyable communication experience for your community by reducing clutter and emphasizing important messages. ### 🔧 Administrator Experience Server administrators will love the simple yet powerful tools ClearrChatZ provides. With minimal configuration required and intuitive commands, chat management becomes effortless. ### 🌱 Future Development The plugin is actively maintained with planned future enhancements including: - Timed automatic chat clearing - - Per-world chat clearing options - - Chat slow mode and cooldown features - - Chat formatting and anti-spam functionality - - Custom clear animations and effects ## Technical Specifications - Lightweight JAR file - - Efficient code design with minimal CPU usage - - Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.20+ - - Works with Paper, Spigot, Bukkit servers - - Supports all major permission systems ## Getting Started Installation is simple - just drop the plugin into your server's plugins folder and restart. The default configuration works out of the box, but you can easily customize all aspects through the config.yml file. Make your server chat experience cleaner and more professional with ClearrChatZ - the clear choice for chat management!
